history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body 3D render of a stylized anime-like female character with long, wavy, ash-blonde hair adorned with a white floral crown. She is wearing a short, puffy white dress with a sweetheart neckline and white high-heeled shoes. In her right hand, she holds a white purse. Her left hand is on a large, white, scythe-like weapon with intricate, sharp, crystalline details. To her right, a large, white, skeletal dragon head emerges, also with sharp, crystalline features, its mouth open in a roar. The background is a dark, minimalist, abstract cityscape with tall, grey, rectangular structures and a dark, textured floor. Above the character, a cluster of bright, pixelated purple stars and a glowing "+1UP" graphic are visible, surrounded by smaller, sparkling purple effects. The overall mood is ethereal and slightly fantastical, with a cool, muted color palette dominated by whites, greys, and purples, illuminated by a soft, diffused light that highlights the character and her accessories. The style is reminiscent of a video game character model or an anime illustration.
